summary: This is a recording of Taraweeh prayers performed during Ramadan 2025 at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The transcript contains the recitation of multiple Quranic surahs during the evening prayers, including portions of Surah Al-Jumu'ah, Surah Al-Munafiqun, Surah At-Taghabun, Surah At-Talaq, Surah At-Tahrim, Surah Al-Mulk, and Surah Al-Qalam. Interspersed within the Quranic recitations are brief announcements regarding the logistics of the event, including information about accommodations for families, volunteer opportunities, and guidance on facility usage, as well as some sermonic guidance on the practice of supplication (dua).
suggested_title: Taraweeh Prayer Night - Ramadan 2025 with Community Announcements
